ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.q: What should I order at Gumbo Social?
ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.a: The smoked cochon gumbo and shrimp po'boy are the most praised dishes. The po'boy has large, generously portioned shrimp. The chicken & sausage gumbo is also highly recommended.

ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.q: Is Gumbo Social good for Southern food in San Francisco?
ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.a: Yes, multiple reviewers call it the best Southern soul food and gumbo they've had outside of Louisiana. The flavors are described as deep and authentic.

ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.q: How are the prices at Gumbo Social?
ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.a: Reviewers describe the prices as fair and filling for the price point. The lunch special includes a half po'boy, fries, and a cup of gumbo.

ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.q: Is Gumbo Social worth visiting as a tourist?
ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.a: Yes. One reviewer visiting for a birthday trip called it a hidden foodie gem and compared the gumbo favorably to restaurants in New Orleans.

ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.q: How are the fries at Gumbo Social?
ChIJx0-99jN_j4ARYi7p0JeScxQ.a: Surprisingly good according to reviewers. One said they were more satisfying than McDonald's fries, perfectly seasoned and crispy.

ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.q: What's the best dish at Smoke Soul Kitchen?
ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.a: The chicken and waffles are the standout, with one reviewer calling them the best in the city. The Off the Porch Breakfast is also popular.

ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.q: Is Smoke Soul Kitchen good for breakfast?
ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.a: Yes, it's a popular breakfast spot serving Southern classics like chicken and waffles. It packs a lot of flavor according to reviewers.

ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.q: What's the service like at Smoke Soul Kitchen?
ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.a: Mixed. The food quality is praised, but some reviewers mention a sign-up and wait system that can be frustrating, especially when the restaurant isn't full.

ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.q: Does Smoke Soul Kitchen have good mac and cheese?
ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.a: Yes, one reviewer said they'll be thinking about the mac and cheese until they return. The sides are generally well-regarded.

ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.q: Any downsides to Smoke Soul Kitchen?
ChIJRyhPZfp_j4ARtHYJR9rrvG4.a: Some reviewers found the food just okay and not standout. The wait system (signing up to be called) frustrated some visitors, and portions may not impress everyone.

ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.q: What kind of food does Hungry Cafe serve?
ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.a: California-style Mediterranean dishes including falafel with carrot hummus, dolmas, and pickled vegetables. Great for breakfast or lunch.

ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.q: Is Hungry Cafe a good place to work or study?
ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.a: Yes, reviewers praise the peaceful atmosphere, free wifi, comforting yet spacious space, and beautiful outdoor spots nearby. Great for a work date.

ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.q: Does Hungry Cafe have halal options?
ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.a: Yes, they offer halal chicken as a bonus alongside their Mediterranean menu.

ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.q: What are the coffee drinks like at Hungry Cafe?
ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.a: They offer unique latte flavors like orange blossom, rosemary, and hibiscus. Coffee quality is well-regarded.

ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.q: Is Hungry Cafe good for a casual visit?
ChIJU4y-xQV_j4ARmRn8sW3qVvA.a: Yes, staff is super friendly, the menu is limited but very fresh, and it's a nice spot to relax and read or catch up with someone.

ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.q: What makes Old Skool Cafe special?
ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.a: It's a 1920s speakeasy-themed supper club with live jazz, zoot-suited staff, and stunning chandeliers. The experience is as much about the atmosphere as the food.

ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.q: What should I order at Old Skool Cafe?
ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.a: The Tongan Oto appetizer and gumbo are highly recommended. The Peanut Butter Stew is also praised. Everything on the menu gets strong reviews.

ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.q: Is Old Skool Cafe good for a date night?
ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.a: Absolutely. The cozy, elegant atmosphere with live jazz music makes it perfect for a special evening out. Multiple reviewers describe it as an unforgettable experience.

ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.q: What's the story behind Old Skool Cafe?
ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.a: It has a meaningful mission that reviewers admire. The combination of purpose, exceptional food, and unique 1920s ambience makes it a true gem in SF.

ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.q: How's the service at Old Skool Cafe?
ChIJR2oUXAV_j4AR0TNvp-w7vjs.a: Exceptional. Servers are described as friendly, attentive, and part of the overall experience with their zoot-suited presentation.

ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.q: What kind of food does Frank Grizzly's serve?
ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.a: Mexican-Asian fusion. The menu features birria tacos, duck tostadas, quesabirria tacos, and churros. Reviewers love the unique fusion combinations.

ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.q: What's the best thing to order at Frank Grizzly's?
ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.a: The birria taco, duck tostada, and quesabirria taco are favorites. The churros and cucumber lime agua fresca are also excellent.

ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.q: Is Frank Grizzly's a hidden gem?
ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.a: Yes, the owner knows all the locals by name, and the food is described as delicious and unique. Reviewers recommend calling ahead as it can get busy.

ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.q: How are the nachos at Frank Grizzly's?
ChIJR0dVn-p_j4AROPhoGajXwL8.a: Incredible according to reviewers. After multiple visits, the nachos and the Dilla are highlighted as must-tries.
Yes, reviewers describe it as a great little spot with good food at fair prices. The Mexican-Asian fusion is unique to the area.

ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.q: What's the signature item at Craftsman and Wolves the Den?
ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.a: The Rebel Within, their famous savory muffin with a soft-cooked egg inside. It's smaller than expected but highly praised.

ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.q: Is Craftsman and Wolves the Den expensive?
ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.a: It feels pricey at $15-20 for a cafe item, but reviewers note the quality justifies it. The pastries are beautifully made.

ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.q: What else is good besides The Rebel Within?
ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.a: The avocado toast, cocoa carrot muffin, Roxanne cookie, Valrhona chocolate financier, and the sipping chocolate are all recommended.

ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.q: What's the vibe at Craftsman and Wolves the Den?
ChIJh9aDwBl_j4AR_54Nm-1T2Zs.a: Bright and slick with an impressive selection of baked goods. It's a proper artisan bakery-cafe experience.
Yes, they serve Stumptown coffee including nitro brew. The drink options are well-regarded.

ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.q: Is All Good Pizza worth trying?
ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.a: Opinions are split. Pizza lovers rave about thin crust Neapolitan-style pizza with incredible flavors, but some find it too oily with soggy salads.

ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.q: What's the best thing to order at All Good Pizza?
ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.a: The meatball sub with incredible meatballs, the mushroom panini, and the Neapolitan-style pizza are standouts. The hibiscus lemonade is also popular.

ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.q: What's the atmosphere like at All Good Pizza?
ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.a: A funky parking lot setting in southeast San Francisco. Clean, cozy inside with good music selection. It's casual and charming.

ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.q: Any downsides to All Good Pizza?
ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.a: Some reviewers found excess oil dripping from the pizza. The salad can be soggy. Hours are limited, and they're closed on some days.

ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.q: How are the prices at All Good Pizza?
ChIJwwA0rwh_j4ARbLQdX8x74rQ.a: A sausage pizza runs about $20.50. Not cheap, but the quality and Neapolitan style are what you're paying for.

ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.q: Is Laughing Monk Brewing good for craft beer?
ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.a: Yes, reviewers describe it as making world-class beer. It stands out as one of the most distinctive craft breweries in San Francisco.

ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.q: Can I host a party at Laughing Monk Brewing?
ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.a: Absolutely. The space is incredibly accommodating for parties. One reviewer hosted a 45th birthday for 16 people and praised the food, drinks, and service.

ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.q: What's the vibe at Laughing Monk Brewing?
ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.a: Quiet and relaxed, great for getting away from crowds. Board games available. Located in a quiet industrial area of Bayview.

ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.q: Do they serve food at Laughing Monk Brewing?
ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.a: Not always. Some days they don't serve food, but there are food spots nearby on 3rd Street. Check before visiting.

ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.q: How are the cocktails at Laughing Monk?
ChIJUb13xhh_j4ARCo6tyBzSm9s.a: On point, according to reviewers. The bartenders (Nyssa and Axel mentioned by name) are praised for handling even picky requests well.

ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.q: What should I order at Sco's?
ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.a: The shrimp ceviche tostada and fish ceviche are standouts. The green shrimp aguachile is outstanding. Pair with a michelada made right in front of you.

ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.q: Is Sco's good for seafood in Bayview?
ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.a: Yes, reviewers are thrilled to have fresh ceviche and aguachile in Bayview. The seafood is described as incredibly fresh and full of flavor.

ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.q: How are the micheladas at Sco's?
ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.a: Excellent. Made right in front of you with care, including chamoy gummy and rim dressing. The bottled micheladas are also on point.

ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.q: How do I get to Sco's?
ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.a: The T-line will get you right there. There's also outdoor seating for small groups, with lots of parking available.

ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.q: What's the atmosphere like at Sco's?
ChIJjZUCbgB_j4ARC3N2s-GfiRg.a: Casual, friendly outdoor setting. Great for a refreshing lunch on a hot day. Reviewers love the fresh, vibrant flavors.

ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.q: What's the best item at The Deli Lama?
ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.a: The breakfast burrito is the star, competing with the best in the Mission. The TBA sandwich is also awesome.

ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.q: Is The Deli Lama a hidden gem?
ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.a: Yes, it's a bit off the beaten path with difficult parking, but reviewers consistently call it a hidden gem with delicious food and generous portions.

ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.q: How's the service at The Deli Lama?
ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.a: Fast service for takeout or casual indoor seating. Jimmy, the friendly new owner, and the staff are described as chill and welcoming.

ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.q: How long has The Deli Lama been open?
ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.a: It first opened 11 years ago. Jimmy, the current owner, took over in November and maintains the quality.

ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.q: Do they accept credit cards at The Deli Lama?
ChIJe7BQE6x_j4ARH65dDxeBHoE.a: Yes, they accept credit cards, which reviewers appreciate.

ChIJL6OKUgh_j4AR6kK_Q1bHMLA.a: The spicy broccoli with rice, salt and pepper chicken wings, and chow fun are popular choices. The house special option is recommended over seafood.
Yes, well-priced with good portion sizes for a quick and simple Chinese restaurant. Don't expect gourmet, but the quality-to-price ratio is solid.

ChIJL6OKUgh_j4AR6kK_Q1bHMLA.q: Is Soo Fong a hole-in-the-wall spot?
ChIJL6OKUgh_j4AR6kK_Q1bHMLA.a: Yes, it's hard to spot but worth finding. The food is finely seasoned and well-cooked, and the staff is friendly and quick.
Yes, they're available on DoorDash. Reviewers note the food holds up well for delivery.

ChIJL6OKUgh_j4AR6kK_Q1bHMLA.q: Any tips for ordering at Soo Fong?
ChIJL6OKUgh_j4AR6kK_Q1bHMLA.a: Go for the House option over the Seafood option. The Chow Fun is great, and the pineapple fried rice gets good mentions too.

ChIJL-8TQwh_j4AR39gvp4dnz80.a: Their nachos are legendary. They use real nacho cheese with other cheeses. One reviewer has been coming for 20 years specifically for the nachos.

ChIJL-8TQwh_j4AR39gvp4dnz80.q: How long has La Laguna been in Bayview?
ChIJL-8TQwh_j4AR39gvp4dnz80.a: Ray the owner has had the restaurant for 25 years in Bayview. It's a true neighborhood institution.
Mixed reviews. Loyal customers love the nachos and the friendly service from Ray. But some warn about greasy food and billing concerns.

ChIJL-8TQwh_j4AR39gvp4dnz80.q: How's the service at La Laguna?
ChIJL-8TQwh_j4AR39gvp4dnz80.a: The service is fantastic and friendly, with the owner Ray knowing his regulars. The place is clean. However, some reviewers have had negative billing experiences.
Some reviewers report very greasy food that caused stomach issues, and one reported being overcharged with a non-itemized receipt. Check your bill.

ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.q: What should I order at Breakfast At Tiffany's?
ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.a: The waffle special, veggie omelette, and western skillet are popular. The orange juice is freshly squeezed and highly recommended.

ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.q: What's the atmosphere like at Breakfast At Tiffany's?
ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.a: Super cozy and cute with a nostalgic 90s breakfast diner feel. It's a great place for a weekend morning out.

ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.q: How are the portions at Breakfast At Tiffany's?
ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.a: Very large portions. You'll leave full. The food is described as good, fresh, and well-prepared.

ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.q: Is there a wait at Breakfast At Tiffany's?
ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.a: On Saturday mornings, expect about a 30-minute wait for 2 people. It's a popular spot, especially on weekends.

ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.q: How's the staff at Breakfast At Tiffany's?
ChIJwXV93vx-j4ARHCdKPwWqFJE.a: The server is described as very cheerful and accommodating. The overall atmosphere is welcoming and friendly.

ChIJCe7PjMKFhYARkc_8AkX5CHk.q: Is Early Bird Tacos good for catering?
ChIJCe7PjMKFhYARkc_8AkX5CHk.a: Excellent. Multiple reviewers used them for team events and parties of 20+ people. They handle last-minute orders well and set everything up neatly.
Yes, they do both breakfast tacos and lunch tacos for events. The breakfast option is particularly popular for morning team events.

ChIJCe7PjMKFhYARkc_8AkX5CHk.q: How's the food quality for catering?
ChIJCe7PjMKFhYARkc_8AkX5CHk.a: Great. Food is plentiful, comes with all the toppings, and teams consistently love it. Multiple companies have made them their go-to caterer.
Yes, delivery is prompt and the setup person is professional. They even arrive a little early sometimes, which reviewers appreciate.

ChIJCe7PjMKFhYARkc_8AkX5CHk.q: Can Early Bird Tacos handle large groups?
ChIJCe7PjMKFhYARkc_8AkX5CHk.a: Yes, they've successfully catered for parties of 23+ employees and post-wedding brunches. Great for team offsites and corporate lunches.

ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.q: What's special about Chef Li's Cafe?
ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.a: Their $26 all-you-can-eat hotpot with a huge menu is the standout value. They also serve Hong Kong-style BBQ with roasted duck as a highlight.

ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.q: Is Chef Li's good for hotpot?
ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.a: Great value. The all-you-can-eat hotpot includes standard meats, veggies, noodles, plus BBQ meats from their front store and many other Chinese dishes.

ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.q: What about the BBQ at Chef Li's?
ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.a: The roasted duck is highly recommended. The roasted pork belly has good portions but can be salty. The skin isn't crispy, but overall it's decent.

ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.q: How's the service at Chef Li's?
ChIJY2BJ9-J-j4ARj_pzeKOJHF8.a: Quick service with nice, friendly people. Can be busy around holidays like Lunar New Year. Customer service is consistently praised.
Excellent value, especially the all-you-can-eat hotpot at $26 with an extensive menu. The portions on regular dishes are also generous.

ChIJLdQzOdZ_j4ARLDAWLCQCoxw.q: Is Little Skillet good for soul food?
ChIJLdQzOdZ_j4ARLDAWLCQCoxw.a: Opinions are divided. Some call it exceptional with warm, inviting atmosphere and great fried chicken. Others found the chicken lacked seasoning and the greens were horrible.

ChIJLdQzOdZ_j4ARLDAWLCQCoxw.q: What should I order at Little Skillet?
ChIJLdQzOdZ_j4ARLDAWLCQCoxw.a: The fried chicken is the main draw. When done well, it's praised. The pulled pork and mac and cheese also get mentions, particularly for kids.
Warm, inviting, with great music and character. Multiple reviewers describe it as having a unique soul food vibe. Great spot near the Giants stadium.
Inconsistent quality. Some found fried chicken well-executed, while others found it lacking seasoning. Sides like greens and cornbread got mixed reviews.
Yes, it's near the Giants game area. A good option if you're looking for soul food before or after a game.

ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.a: Giant made-to-order deli sandwiches for under $7. Generous portions of cold cuts on a wide choice of bread. It's a community landmark.

ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.q: How are the prices at Constanso's?
ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.a: Incredibly affordable. $6-7 for a big, made-to-order sandwich with generous meat portions. One of the best values in SF.

ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.q: Do I need cash at Constanso's?
ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.a: Yes, make sure to have cash. They also have freshly made grab-and-go sandwiches if you're in a rush.

ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.q: How long has Constanso's been around?
ChIJIYQWkQh_j4ARiOe9DljBK90.a: It's a community landmark that has been serving reasonably priced lunches for a very long time in the construction workers' area.
Fast. The guys behind the counter work quickly. They can make it fresh to order, or you can grab a pre-made sandwich for even quicker service.

ChIJjesmxhp_j4ARjVAcgl6flNc.q: Is JJ Fish and Chicken one of the best in SF?
ChIJjesmxhp_j4ARjVAcgl6flNc.a: Reviewers think so. The fish is freshly breaded and fried to order with perfect seasoning. Multiple reviewers call it the best fried fish they've had.

ChIJjesmxhp_j4ARjVAcgl6flNc.q: What should I order at JJ Fish and Chicken?
ChIJjesmxhp_j4ARjVAcgl6flNc.a: The catfish and shrimp combo with fries is popular. Hush puppies are moist and delicious, and the okra is perfectly crispy. Don't skip the German chocolate cake.

ChIJjesmxhp_j4ARjVAcgl6flNc.q: How are the portions at JJ Fish and Chicken?
ChIJjesmxhp_j4ARjVAcgl6flNc.a: Huge. A ton of food as shown in photos. The choice of two fish and fries runs about $16.99 with generous portions.
Yes. Food is made to order so expect about 15 minutes. It comes out piping hot and fresh. One reviewer drove 45 minutes and said it was worth it.
Great selection of cake including red velvet, yellow chocolate, banana pudding, and German chocolate. The cakes are a pleasant surprise.

ChIJU47IjMp_j4ARKcQIlsdSjGM.a: A serious taco truck deep in industrial Bayview-Hunters Point. A welcome food oasis in an area with few options, serving Nicaraguan-style food.

ChIJU47IjMp_j4ARKcQIlsdSjGM.q: What should I order at MDJK?
ChIJU47IjMp_j4ARKcQIlsdSjGM.a: The cheese pupusas are heavenly, and the Nicaraguan-style burritos are delicious. Carnitas, pollo asado, and tripas tacos are all good.
Yes, the staff is friendly and fast, and the food is high quality at great prices. Multiple reviewers wish they could come back more often.
Yes, the cheese pupusas are a standout. Reviewers describe them as heavenly and keep coming back specifically for them.

ChIJhS2_NhZ_j4AR3tWfSfeDA8Q.q: What kind of food does City Lunch Restaurant serve?
ChIJhS2_NhZ_j4AR3tWfSfeDA8Q.a: Korean and American food. They serve Korean marinated short ribs (galbi), spicy beef soup (yukgaejang), galbi tang, plus burgers and breakfast items.

ChIJhS2_NhZ_j4AR3tWfSfeDA8Q.q: Is City Lunch good for breakfast?
ChIJhS2_NhZ_j4AR3tWfSfeDA8Q.a: Yes, it's a great spot for quick breakfast with focused menu options. Popular with workers in the area. The breakfast service is fast.

ChIJhS2_NhZ_j4AR3tWfSfeDA8Q.q: What's the best Korean dish at City Lunch?
ChIJhS2_NhZ_j4AR3tWfSfeDA8Q.a: The Gal Bi Tang (Korean beef rib soup) is perfect for cold days. The teriyaki chicken plate is delicious with a fresh side salad.
Set up for workers in the warehouse district. Quick service, friendly owner and cook. Not gourmet, but satisfying and authentic.
Parking and traffic can be difficult at times, but worth a visit if you're looking for quick, good food in the area.

ChIJdzH2Xw9_j4AR7Fkxg48FVT4.q: What kind of food does Las Isletas serve?
ChIJdzH2Xw9_j4AR7Fkxg48FVT4.a: Central American food spanning Honduras, Nicaragua, El Salvador, and Mexico. Protein-focused plates with rice, beans, and salad.

ChIJdzH2Xw9_j4AR7Fkxg48FVT4.q: Are the pupusas good at Las Isletas?
ChIJdzH2Xw9_j4AR7Fkxg48FVT4.a: Taste-wise yes, reviewers love them. But overall quality is inconsistent. Some dishes come greasy, and some items like tamales have gotten negative reviews.

ChIJdzH2Xw9_j4AR7Fkxg48FVT4.q: What's the best thing to order at Las Isletas?
ChIJdzH2Xw9_j4AR7Fkxg48FVT4.a: The fried fish plate gets strong praise. The pupusas are tasty. The Nicaraguan beer pairs well with meals.
Inconsistency is the main issue. Some food is greasy, tamales had too many chickpeas and undercooked potato, and some meat items taste burnt.

ChIJCdThHid_j4ARmKf7ca0sL5o.a: Breakfast. Their pancakes are fluffy, bacon perfectly crispy, and the scrambles and omelets are excellent. Great for a solid, traditional breakfast.

ChIJCdThHid_j4ARmKf7ca0sL5o.q: Is Bayside Cafe good for families?
ChIJCdThHid_j4ARmKf7ca0sL5o.a: Yes, reviewers bring their families for breakfast and everyone enjoys it. They serve breakfast, lunch, and dinner all day long.

ChIJCdThHid_j4ARmKf7ca0sL5o.q: How's the service at Bayside Cafe?
ChIJCdThHid_j4ARmKf7ca0sL5o.a: Very friendly and heartwarming. It's a local favorite where staff recognizes regular patrons. The atmosphere is warm and welcoming.
Yes, available on UberEats. Reviewers note the burgers and home fries arrive fresh and quickly.
Yes, one reviewer stopped here on their last morning of a west coast road trip and plans to save it for next time. A real local gem.

ChIJEUvb8Px-j4AR4zBpLCfYI4U.a: Best roast duck and rice plate in SF for around $10-11. They specialize in Chinese BBQ takeout.

ChIJEUvb8Px-j4AR4zBpLCfYI4U.q: Is there indoor dining at Top's Cafe?
ChIJEUvb8Px-j4AR4zBpLCfYI4U.a: No, indoor dining is no longer available. It's now a takeout/deli-style service for BBQ items. There's usually a line.

ChIJEUvb8Px-j4AR4zBpLCfYI4U.q: What should I order at Top's Cafe?
ChIJEUvb8Px-j4AR4zBpLCfYI4U.a: The BBQ duck with rice is the go-to. BBQ pork is also popular but may sell out by evening. Items are spot on for Chinese BBQ.
Possibly. One reviewer was told cash only unless ordering over a certain amount. Come prepared with cash.
Changed ownership in late 2025. Some longtime customers report less honest service under new management. The menu is now BBQ-only with limited vegetable options.

ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.q: What should I order at Rome's Kitchen?
ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.a: The BBQ hot link sandwich is one of a kind. The fried fish with seasoning is exceptional. The candied yams and cabbage are full of flavor.

ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.q: Where can I find Rome's Kitchen?
ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.a: They do pop-ups in various locations during the week. Follow their Instagram to stay updated on where they'll be next.

ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.q: Is Rome's Kitchen good for catering?
ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.a: Yes, they catered fried chicken, mac and cheese, greens, and yams for a work event and everything was delicious, hot, and fresh.

ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.q: How's the fish at Rome's Kitchen?
ChIJHXzfcNR_j4ARrDJqckJJy1s.a: Outstanding. One reviewer who normally doesn't like fish said Rome's redeemed fish for them. The seasoning on the fried fish is exceptional.
Above and beyond. The people are genuinely nice and care about the food they serve. Reviewers consistently praise the warmth and hospitality.

ChIJsezvWyx-j4ARWGoc17QrZFY.q: What's best at Hardwood Bar & Smokery?
ChIJsezvWyx-j4ARWGoc17QrZFY.a: The burger and blackened catfish are standouts. The house-made sauces are killer, especially the dill ranch and tangy mustard.

ChIJsezvWyx-j4ARWGoc17QrZFY.q: How's the BBQ at Hardwood Bar & Smokery?
ChIJsezvWyx-j4ARWGoc17QrZFY.a: Mixed. The sides and sauces are amazing, but some reviewers found the brisket too dry with thick cuts, and ribs tough. Others enjoyed the BBQ.
Yes, they have a very solid spirits menu. Good for having a drink with your meal.
Amazing. Even on very busy days, the waitstaff rushes around to make sure everyone is taken care of. Servers are friendly and helpful.
The smoked meats can be hit-or-miss. Multiple reviewers found the brisket and ribs dry. The sides and sauces make up for it, but the meat is inconsistent.

ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.q: What should I order at Tato?
ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.a: The steak egg and cheese breakfast quesadilla is big enough to share. The three-taco plate ($15) with salmon, butternut squash, and steak is popular. Banana horchata smoothie is a must.
Yes, they have a great variety of vegetarian options. You can choose proteins including vegetarian options in a burrito, taco, or bowl.

ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.q: How are the tacos at Tato?
ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.a: Reviewers describe them as the best tacos they've ever had. Fresh ingredients with unique options like salmon and butternut squash alongside traditional steak.

ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.q: What's the atmosphere like at Tato?
ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.a: The restaurant has a nice ambiance. It's labeled 'Hecho en Bayview' and has a welcoming, community feel.

ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.q: Are the daily specials worth it?
ChIJg1cNhgV_j4ARtr7DDkOVWB8.a: The $12 daily specials look great according to reviewers. The portions are generous and the ingredients are fresh.

ChIJL6OKUgh_j4ARjjPOzOJEpCU.q: What's the best item at Tiffanys Cafe?
ChIJL6OKUgh_j4ARjjPOzOJEpCU.a: The Healthy Start Wrap is a customer favorite. The breakfast burrito is called the best in town, comparable to Austin breakfast tacos.

ChIJL6OKUgh_j4ARjjPOzOJEpCU.q: Is Tiffanys Cafe good for breakfast?
ChIJL6OKUgh_j4ARjjPOzOJEpCU.a: Yes, excellent breakfast bagel sandwiches made exactly to your desire. Everything bagels with fried eggs, choice of meat, avocado, and grilled onions.

ChIJL6OKUgh_j4ARjjPOzOJEpCU.q: How's the coffee at Tiffanys Cafe?
ChIJL6OKUgh_j4ARjjPOzOJEpCU.a: The coffee is a hit, and the lattes are described as fantastic. Good quality for a neighborhood cafe.
Great counter service from Harry and the cooking staff. Friendly and quick.
One reviewer felt scammed paying $20 for a double meat breakfast burrito that arrived as basically a vegetarian, room-temperature burrito. Quality may vary.

ChIJ20bNEACBhYARtsTcSrSPFdU.a: Yes, the vegetarian menu variety is impressive with dishes that are flavorful and beautifully presented. A true gem for vegetarian lovers.

ChIJ20bNEACBhYARtsTcSrSPFdU.q: Is Alora good for happy hour?
ChIJ20bNEACBhYARtsTcSrSPFdU.a: Yes, the happy hour menu features oysters, negronis, and limoncello spritzes. Everything is fresh and well done. A lovely way to start the weekend.
Fancy-looking spot with a beautiful bar. The atmosphere is great for dates or happy hours. Mediterranean coastal vibes.
Outstanding. The server Pooja was specifically praised. Staff is super friendly and makes the overall experience special.
Some reviewers found most items slightly overpriced for the portion sizes. The mezze platter is tasty but overall pricing runs on the higher side.

ChIJMTt42OJ-j4ARhWVPXaTY2jc.q: Does Imperial Garden have vegan dim sum?
ChIJMTt42OJ-j4ARhWVPXaTY2jc.a: Yes! They have one of the biggest vegan dim sum menus reviewers have ever seen. They're fused with Sassy Vegan and the options are incredible.

ChIJMTt42OJ-j4ARhWVPXaTY2jc.q: What's the best vegan item at Imperial Garden?
ChIJMTt42OJ-j4ARhWVPXaTY2jc.a: The vegan xiao long bao is outstanding, even for people who grew up eating the traditional version. The sesame buns are a must-try.

ChIJMTt42OJ-j4ARhWVPXaTY2jc.q: Is Imperial Garden good for non-vegans too?
ChIJMTt42OJ-j4ARhWVPXaTY2jc.a: Yes, they serve traditional Chinese dim sum alongside the vegan menu. The salty fish and egg fried rice, chow fun, and BBQ pork buns are all good.
The food is very good and has been for a long time through multiple ownership changes. Every reviewer finds it delicious and authentic.
Absolutely, especially for vegans. Any vegan in San Francisco should visit. The extensive vegan dim sum menu is rare and genuinely delicious.

ChIJGwifkZp_j4ARYHzO7Mxh4C4.q: How's the fried chicken at Krispy Krunchy?
ChIJGwifkZp_j4ARYHzO7Mxh4C4.a: Mixed. Some say it's better than Popeyes and KFC with great seasoning. Others find it pre-made and sitting under a heat lamp.
Big pieces and a lot of food for the price. Delivery quality matches in-person quality.

ChIJGwifkZp_j4ARYHzO7Mxh4C4.q: What else is good besides chicken?
ChIJGwifkZp_j4ARYHzO7Mxh4C4.a: The honey biscuits and jambalaya rice get praise. They also serve burritos. The food is generally tasty and satisfying.
Sides are too small according to some reviewers. The chicken isn't always freshly fried. Value is decent but some feel the price is high for what you get.

ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.a: Yes, excellent quality banh mi with fresh ingredients, fresh bread, and a perfect ratio of meat to pickled veggies. Consistently praised.

ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.q: What's the best banh mi to order?
ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.a: The combination pork is the most popular. Grilled pork and five-spiced chicken are also great. All options are well-made.
Yes, cash only. Make sure to bring cash before visiting.

ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.q: Can I get Vietnamese iced coffee?
ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.a: Yes, but not after 3pm. One reviewer warns it'll keep you wired until 3am if you drink it late.

ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.q: Is Banh Mi House good for takeaway?
ChIJWXnT7-J-j4AR5wn2heRZd-k.a: Yes, they even accommodate travel requests. One reviewer got a banh mi for the plane, and they recommended not toasting it and cutting it in half for easier eating.

ChIJFTpWPAp_j4ARH9UXgeJy5vE.a: Very mixed reviews. Some love the authentic environment and delicious food, calling it a hidden gem. Others found noodles undercooked and management rude.
Authentic and retro. Feels like stepping into the past. Some enjoy the old-school charm while others find it outdated.
Not always. One reviewer found the door closed at 6pm despite listed hours. Call ahead to confirm.
When good, the Chinese food is authentic and properly prepared. Staff can be friendly and quick on a good day.

ChIJpXI8PAp_j4ARqU_DoHOBVJs.q: Is Vasquez Coffee the best coffee in Bayview?
ChIJpXI8PAp_j4ARqU_DoHOBVJs.a: Reviewers say it's the best coffee in the Bay Area and the best local roaster in San Francisco. They've been roasting since 1997, nearly 30 years.

ChIJpXI8PAp_j4ARqU_DoHOBVJs.q: Do they serve food at Vasquez Coffee?
ChIJpXI8PAp_j4ARqU_DoHOBVJs.a: Yes, their sandwiches are highly recommended. Fresh-tasting ingredients on perfectly toasted bread. The food is as good as the coffee.
Yes, it's a women-owned local business with a cute, cozy shop and great atmosphere.

ChIJpXI8PAp_j4ARqU_DoHOBVJs.q: Is it near the sports stadiums?
ChIJpXI8PAp_j4ARqU_DoHOBVJs.a: Yes, only a 10-minute drive from Chase Center and Oracle Park. A great first stop before an early Giants game.
A lovely, friendly neighborhood coffee shop. Staff is kind and welcoming. Can be quiet when you arrive but fills up with regulars.

ChIJuTDWD-OAhYARHdAhflk13Sc.q: What should I order at Boudin Bakery?
ChIJuTDWD-OAhYARHdAhflk13Sc.a: The clam chowder in a sourdough bread bowl is the iconic must-try. The bread is amazing and the crab melt is also popular.

ChIJuTDWD-OAhYARHdAhflk13Sc.q: Is Boudin Bakery worth the tourist crowds?
ChIJuTDWD-OAhYARHdAhflk13Sc.a: Yes, it's a bit pricey since it's at Pier 39, but the sourdough is fresh, service is quick, and it's a San Francisco tradition worth experiencing.
Very fast despite long lines. Reviewers note they barely sat down before their number was called. Separate lines for cafe orders and food orders.
Yes, kids enjoy the sourdough animal shapes on display and the food is family-friendly. A good lunch stop after a morning walking the Embarcadero.
A bit pricey given the tourist location, but the quality is there. Expect tourist-area pricing near Pier 39.

ChIJZTANhyJ_j4ARBbGyjkwKEAU.a: It's a cultural hub serving Mexican breakfast-lunch with a Guatemalan twist. They open at 4:30am and serve full meals that early. Central American authenticity.

ChIJZTANhyJ_j4ARBbGyjkwKEAU.q: What should I order at Marthita's?
ChIJZTANhyJ_j4ARBbGyjkwKEAU.a: The huevos rancheros are basic but taste cooked from scratch. The brisket burrito is a favorite. Also try empanadas and Central American-style fried chicken.
4:30am. You can get a full, authentic Central American meal before the rest of the city wakes up.
Very. It's described as unpretentious authenticity with dishes that taste homemade. A Mexican-Guatemalan experience that's a cultural hub for the community.
Yes, they have grab-and-go crispy specials like empanadas alongside their taqueria standards.

ChIJRf0-RgV_j4ARCwnD2kWw1v4.q: Is Peking Wok good for Chinese food in Bayview?
ChIJRf0-RgV_j4ARCwnD2kWw1v4.a: Yes, it offers a wide variety of traditional and contemporary Chinese dishes. The fried chicken is particularly popular.

ChIJRf0-RgV_j4ARCwnD2kWw1v4.q: What should I order at Peking Wok?
ChIJRf0-RgV_j4ARCwnD2kWw1v4.a: The fried chicken is the standout. The chow mein is also good. Some reviewers enjoy the salt and pepper prawns, though quality varies.
Yes, Peking Wok is cash only. Plan accordingly.
Big portions but at higher prices than some competitors on 3rd Street.
Some reviewers found cooking oil tasting old and prawns lacking flavor. A long-time regular reported a first bad experience recently. Quality may vary visit to visit.

ChIJJ67tVB9_j4ARTWUYmais-YU.a: The food is really good despite the rough exterior. Breakfast with grits, potatoes, eggs, and toast is a standout. Don't judge by appearances.

ChIJJ67tVB9_j4ARTWUYmais-YU.q: What should I order at B&J Burgers?
ChIJJ67tVB9_j4ARTWUYmais-YU.a: Breakfast items and the hot link sandwich are popular. The french fries are a longtime customer favorite.
Service is very slow (30+ minutes). Some hygiene concerns noted by reviewers regarding staff not wearing gloves and having chipped nail polish.
No, expect a wait. The food is made to order and takes time. Plan for at least 30 minutes.

ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.a: The chicken wings and steak & shrimp plate are top picks. The fish and burrito combo is described as soul-filling. Everything is fresh to order.

ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.q: How are the portions at Las Palmas?
ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.a: Super large portions. The food is described as bomb with great flavors. Good lemonade too.

ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.q: Any food safety concerns at Las Palmas?
ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.a: One reviewer got food poisoning from chicken and warns about unsafe frying grease. Another found they received a different fish than ordered. Mixed experiences.

ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.q: Is the catfish still good at Las Palmas?
ChIJp79DRRp_j4ARef5R9i5maas.a: A longtime fan reports the crispy cornmeal battered catfish nuggets have changed. Recently received mushy, flavorless fish that wasn't catfish. Quality may have declined.

ChIJ8ykxUQ9_j4ARNpJKtetPv58.q: Is Pizza Zone N Grill good?
ChIJ8ykxUQ9_j4ARNpJKtetPv58.a: Mixed. Fans love the yeasty crust and big value. They cater events with variety chicken wing flavors. But some find the toppings skimpy and overpriced.

ChIJ8ykxUQ9_j4ARNpJKtetPv58.q: What's good at Pizza Zone N Grill?
ChIJ8ykxUQ9_j4ARNpJKtetPv58.a: The pizza with unique combo toppings, fried shrimp with fries, and the burgers. The chicken wings with various flavors are great for events.

ChIJ8ykxUQ9_j4ARNpJKtetPv58.q: Any complaints about Pizza Zone N Grill?
ChIJ8ykxUQ9_j4ARNpJKtetPv58.a: Pepperoni pizza sometimes comes with very little pepperoni. One Philly cheesesteak had no steak, substituted with mushrooms. Quality control is inconsistent.

ChIJZ5RXUwN_j4ARtmtjBiJ0wNE.q: Should I try Wing SZN in Bayview?
ChIJZ5RXUwN_j4ARtmtjBiJ0wNE.a: Probably not. Multiple reviewers report poor wing quality, inconsistent breading, dry and salty wings, barely-fried fries, and no dipping sauce. Most reviews are 1-2 stars.

ChIJZ5RXUwN_j4ARtmtjBiJ0wNE.q: Is there anything good about Wing SZN?
ChIJZ5RXUwN_j4ARtmtjBiJ0wNE.a: The customer service is praised as great. It's a new restaurant that reviewers hope will improve over time.
No, reviewers describe the prices as ridiculous. $40+ for wings, onion rings, and fries that were poorly prepared.

ChIJMa2-JQB_j4AROJr-Dwmbkhs.q: What's good at Cemitas El Puebla?
ChIJMa2-JQB_j4AROJr-Dwmbkhs.a: Everything is handmade, including the tortillas. The food is flavorful and the spot is a hidden gem in Bayview.

ChIJMa2-JQB_j4AROJr-Dwmbkhs.q: Is Cemitas El Puebla worth finding?
ChIJMa2-JQB_j4AROJr-Dwmbkhs.a: Yes, reviewers call it the best in the world for handmade Mexican food. Lovely people and very flavorful dishes.

ChIJQ1CM7SF_j4ARq5EAPcmH-E0.q: What kind of food does Montecristo serve?
ChIJQ1CM7SF_j4ARq5EAPcmH-E0.a: Traditional Salvadoran food with some Mexican options and salads. The pupusas are a highlight, and they also serve a full breakfast menu.

ChIJQ1CM7SF_j4ARq5EAPcmH-E0.q: What should I order at Montecristo?
ChIJQ1CM7SF_j4ARq5EAPcmH-E0.a: The hen soup with grilled hen and fresh tortillas is a favorite. The pupusas are the best according to locals. The creamy pollo is also tasty.

ChIJQ1CM7SF_j4ARq5EAPcmH-E0.q: How are the prices at Montecristo?
ChIJQ1CM7SF_j4ARq5EAPcmH-E0.a: Excellent prices. Reviewers are highly satisfied with the value. Convenient location with good service.
No parking available. Plan to find street parking nearby.
Hole in the wall place with authentic food. Grab a Famosa Beer with your pupusas for the full experience.

ChIJJ3Dj-eJ-j4ARaEwwwDFkeSA.q: What's good at Hong Kong BBQ Restaurant?
ChIJJ3Dj-eJ-j4ARaEwwwDFkeSA.a: The roast pork and ribs are tasty with generous portions. Fish and chicken wings are also popular. Good for quick takeout.

ChIJJ3Dj-eJ-j4ARaEwwwDFkeSA.q: Is Hong Kong BBQ good value?
ChIJJ3Dj-eJ-j4ARaEwwwDFkeSA.a: Great value. A small portion is decent size for only $1.50, so you can get three smalls for $4.50. Delicious and affordable.
Yes, great takeout choices for lunch. The busiest place on the block, which speaks to the quality. Nice lady serving there.
Regular homestyle Chinese cooking with good, flavorful food. Friendly staff who are knowledgeable about the dishes.
